body: hey, grandma just texted—her doctor appt got bumped to 3, she can't walk Lucy home from Singer today. can you grab her?
yeah I can swing by, done with client meetings by 3:15. tell Grandma not to stress about it
ok cool, letting her know now. you still teaching tonight or no?
just the 6pm ESOL class at Montgomery, back by 8. gracias por avisar 👍
Hey bug, Abuela said the Field Day permission slip needs my signature today - I'll pop it in your backpack before she walks you to Singer. Love you 💙
ok!! can u come watch the race on friday??
Gonna try to slip out at lunch - got a client at 2 but that's the fun kind of appointment to skip. Save me a spot by the fence.
yay!! ill wave when i run so u dont miss me
Mum, stuck late tonight—Patricia needs the Guzman file ready before tomorrow's hearing. Can you swing by the library and grab Lucy from the summer reading program at 4?
Of course, she's been asking about that prize all week. I'll get her and stop for groceries after.
You're a lifesaver. Anne called too, she's coming up for the 4th, wants to do a BBQ Saturday if that works.
Saturday's good with me. Tell her to bring that potato salad Michael loves, I'll get the yard set up.
Hey - Mum's got a doctor's appt Thursday at 10, can you grab Lucy from Singer after school? I'm on shift at the hospital till 6.
Yep, I've got a client meeting with Patricia at 2 but should be clear by 3. I'll swing by and get her.
You're a lifesaver. Also fair warning, she'll ask for ice cream after - don't let her talk you into two scoops lol
Ha, no promises, you know she works me. Tell Mum I'll call her tonight to check how it went.
Hey, can you grab Lucy from Singer at 3? Mum's got a dentist thing and I've got a client running long at the office.
Yeah I can do it. Michael's practice ends at 3:30 anyway so it works out.
You're a lifesaver. She's been asking about the science fair board too, it's due Friday.
Ha ok I'll dig out the poster board tonight. Tell her Mom's got her covered 👍
Patricia, wrapped up Mrs. Alvarado's naturalization prep, she's solid for Thursday's interview.
Great, thank you! Any chance you can cover the citizenship clinic at St. Camillus Saturday morning too?
Yeah I can swing it, just gotta shuffle my ESOL grading block at Montgomery first. Should be fine.
Perfect, I'll shoot you the sign-in sheet and case list tonight. Thanks Ian 🙏
Yvette—got the call, Mrs. Alvarez's I-130 finally got approved after 14 months. Patricia's gonna do a happy dance in the office tomorrow lol
SHUT UP that's amazing!! she's been a wreck waiting on that one right?
Yeah, cried on the phone. Gonna grab her a little something from the Silver Spring farmers market Saturday before my ESOL grading pile eats me alive
That's so you 🥹 tell her congrats from me too, and don't let the grading pile win
Hey random q — does Lucy still walk to Singer with mum every morning? Thinking of having my nephew tag along Thurs, he's nervous for first day
yeah every morning like clockwork, 8:15ish. mum won't mind at all, more the merrier lol
perfect, I'll have him ready on the porch by then. thank you Ian!
de nada 🙂 tell him Lucy will show him the shortcut by the crossing guard
Father, got a sec? The Fuentes family's EAD renewal got kicked back for a missing receipt notice. Can you have Marisol call our office tomorrow?
Of course. I'll catch her after the 9am Spanish Mass Sunday, she's there every week with the kids.
Perfect. Tell her to bring the old EAD card too, saves us a step on the refiling.
Will do, Ian. Honestly this parish would be lost without you and Patricia over at Lionsgate.
Ian, Father Alvarez wants the offertory hymn bilingual for Sunday's naturalization Mass - can you help translate verse two?
Yeah send me the lyrics tonight, I know that one from Sagrado Corazon days, shouldn't take long
Perfect. Also tenors are thin for Thursday 7pm rehearsal, you still good?
Should be, just gotta get Mum's dinner sorted first but I'll be there
Carl, sorry - totally spaced it was my watering week for plot 14. Can I swing by after 6 instead of this morning?
No worries, tomatoes can wait lol. Just don't let Lucy 'help' again - she picked all the green ones last time 😄
Ha, noted. She's convinced red ones are 'not ready enough' yet. I'll handle it solo tonight.
Deal. Also bring stakes if you've got any - wind knocked half of plot 12 over yesterday.
Hi Ian, it's Dr. Osei's office — you're due for your flu shot before fall semester kicks off at Montgomery College. Thursday after class work?
Thursday's good, I'm done teaching by 2. Can Mum get hers same day too? She walks Lucy to Singer Elementary every morning, trying to keep her exposure down.
Bring her along, I'll pencil you both in for 2:30. Anything new since your last visit?
Nothing new, feeling good. See you Thursday, thanks Dr. Osei 🙏
Ian, your Topiramate refill came through - I'd like to see you first. Can you do next Tuesday 10am before your ESOL class?
Tuesday 10 works great, class doesn't start till 11:30 at MC that day. I'll be there.
Perfect, I'll have the front desk pull your chart. Bring the pharmacy info for the CVS on Colesville if it changed.
Same CVS, same everything. See you Tuesday - gracias Dr. Walsh.
Dr. Reeves, quick one — can we move Mum's Thursday appt to afternoon? I've got a hearing downtown that morning.
Sure thing, I have a 2:30 open. I'll have Deb call to confirm and update the chart.
Perfect, thank you. Also the Silver Spring CVS says her refill's ready — just wanted to confirm nothing changed on the dosage.
No changes this round, same as last month. See you both Thursday at 2:30.
Dr. Aguilar, need to move Lucy's cleaning off Thursday - Mum can't walk her to Singer Elementary that day, it's a half day. Any chance of Wednesday?
Wednesday works, I've got 3:30 open, does that fit?
Perfect, I can swing by right after my ESOL class at Montgomery wraps. Gracias!
See you both then. Tell Lucy no candy till after the cleaning 😄
Gloria — heads up, Thursday's make-up class moved to 9am, room 204 instead of our usual Tuesday slot.
Ok gracias Mr. Woodward! Can I bring my citizenship interview questions to practice too?
Yep bring it. We'll run the N-400 questions after vocab review, maybe 20 min.
Perfect, nos vemos Thursday 😊
Dr. Thornton, quick one - Lucy got stung by a bee at Sligo Creek yesterday, forearm's swollen but no hives, breathing's fine. Bring her in or watch it?
If it's just local swelling and no breathing trouble, ice it and give Benadryl per weight. Watch through tonight, call me if it spreads past the elbow.
Swelling's already down this morning. Mum iced it before Lucy left for day camp near Singer Elementary.
Good, sounds like a normal reaction. If any hives or wheezing pop up later this week, call me straightaway - otherwise she's fine to keep going to camp.
Diane! Just got a client's asylum case approved this morning, the one you helped me prep intake for back in Feb. Wanted you to know it worked.
Ian that's wonderful news, tell me his name again? And how's the ESOL class at Montgomery going this term?
Going well, 14 students Tuesday nights. Patricia wants me to co-teach a legal-terms module too, so busy but good.
Sounds like you. Bring Lucy by the office sometime, I still owe her a coloring book from her birthday.
Hey stranger — saw Montgomery College posted summer ESOL enrollment, thought of you. Still teaching Tuesday nights?
Yep, Tuesdays and Thursdays through August. Smaller class this session, actually get to know folks for once.
Good. How's Lucy handling her first summer since Singer Elementary let out? Bet she's thrilled.
She's decided summer means unlimited popsicles. Mum's already rationing them lol
Dr. Park, can we move Mum's follow-up off Tuesday 8am? That's when she walks Lucy to Singer Elementary and I've got a client intake I can't shift.
Sure thing — I've got Thursday 9:30 or Friday 1pm open instead, Ian. Either work?
Friday 1pm is good, I'll drive her myself that day. Should she skip the drops beforehand like last time?
Yes, no drops before — we'll dilate here. See Dorothy Friday at 1, front desk will call to confirm.
